visual: Repeat of move 9 — wide bow stance, hooked rear hand, front palm pushing outward.
motion_description: The motion begins with the right arm extended out to the side at shoulder height with a hooked wrist, while the left hand is held near the chest. The torso turns to the left as the left foot steps outward to widen the stance. Weight slowly shifts forward onto the bent left leg into a bow stance, while the left arm extends and pushes outward with an open palm at chest height. The steady, continuous movement finishes with both arms held out in opposite directions.
